name: Treatment With a Marine Oil Supplement Alters Lipid Mediators and Leukocyte Phenotype in Healthy Patients and Those With Peripheral Artery Disease
short_name: SPM marine oil PAD and healthy-volunteer study
summary: A 2020 Journal of the American Heart Association open-label study testing a short-course oral enriched marine oil supplement in healthy volunteers and people with symptomatic peripheral artery disease.
venue: Journal of the American Heart Association
